corrections_from_review_v9.8_to_15: UNCHANGED-ACKNOWLEDGED — PASS-path persistence parity, single-snapshot runtime, dir-fsync durability (OPEN_IN_IMAGE); observed command/mount comparison, signed attestation+receipt (OPEN_IN_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION); structured Phase B + direct input-contract binding, expression-level derivation (OPEN_AT_COUNTERSIGNATURE); final commit + clean-tree Phase-A regeneration (OPEN_AT_COMMIT). Entry now retains parsed receipt/realism/report records and binds a semantic_summary into the run manifest (finding 10 partially closed).
